acceptanceCriteria: TI-09 signal entries list only real repository-relative paths: the scripts-change case records package.json, and no event path contains a # fragment; the TI-09 fire test asserts this

docs/test-integrity.md or docs/orchestration.md states that a dirty-worktree scan diffs tracked files against the base only, so untracked files are invisible to the detectors while worktreeDigest still covers them, and that TI-09 parses the root package.json scripts only

the classify-guard documentation states that the guard reads unsigned local evidence, can be bypassed by fabricating a finalized attempt artifact, and that classifiedBy therefore remains an unattested declaration satisfying no control
dist/rigor.cjs is rebuilt from the final source
the recorded required check git diff --check passes; npm run test:all, npm run bench, and claude plugin validate . --strict are rerun and reported in the pull request
note: Policy permits transmission; minimize content and re-check destination controls.
